creator: gperez@entel.upc.edu
text:
Attached is a patch that updates the port to 0.3.10. It's beeing send
as .txt file, hope it does not get removed.
 
   The patch  also fixes a new problem related with the permissions of
the plugin files. The service.conf of the plugins already have the right
permissions, the other files need the +w flag. Thanks to Barbara for the
fix.

   Best regards,

   Gustau
